data.title: Vaswani Industries Posts Audited FY26 Results, Plans Rs 9.87 Crore Preferential Share Issue
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

Vaswani Industries Limited ( (IN:VASWANI) ) has provided an announcement.

Vaswani Industries reported its audited standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended 31 March 2026, with its statutory auditors issuing an unmodified opinion on both standalone and consolidated accounts, underscoring the integrity of its financial reporting. The board also approved a plan to raise up to Rs 9.87 crore through a preferential issue of equity shares, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals, signaling a move to bolster its capital base and support future funding needs.

The preferential issue will be structured in line with SEBI’s Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements Regulations and related circulars, reinforcing compliance with India’s capital market rules. These decisions, taken at a board meeting held on 30 May 2026, may strengthen Vaswani Industries’ financial flexibility and could have implications for ownership structure and capital allocation, depending on final shareholder approval and issue terms.

More about Vaswani Industries Limited

Vaswani Industries Limited is an India-listed company whose shares trade on both BSE and NSE under the symbol VASWANI. The company operates under SEBI’s listing framework and regularly discloses its financial performance and governance decisions to public market investors and regulators.

Average Trading Volume: 5,243

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 1.77B INR

data.title: Thirumalai Chemicals Confirms Aligned Use of Preferential Issue Funds for Global Expansion
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

Thirumalai Chemicals Limited ( (IN:TIRUMALCHM) ) has shared an update.

Thirumalai Chemicals Limited reported to the stock exchanges that funds raised via a preferential issue on December 18, 2025, totaling Rs. 5,613.99 lakhs, have been utilized in line with stated objectives for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The Audit Committee reviewed the statement and confirmed there was no deviation or variation in the use of proceeds, with allocations directed mainly to capital expenditure through TCL Global BV into TCL Specialties LLC, general corporate purposes and issue expenses, leaving a small residual balance earmarked for corporate use.

The deployment of capital into its U.S.-linked entity underlines Thirumalai Chemicals’ ongoing capacity expansion and international footprint, which may strengthen its competitive position in specialty chemicals markets. For stakeholders, the confirmation of compliance with SEBI’s Regulation 32 and the absence of deviations in fund utilization support governance confidence, transparency in capital deployment and alignment with shareholder-approved objectives.

More about Thirumalai Chemicals Limited

Thirumalai Chemicals Limited is an India-based chemical manufacturer certified under ISO 9001, 14001, 50001, HACCP and FSSC 22000, indicating a focus on quality, environmental management, energy efficiency and food safety. The company operates in specialty and industrial chemicals, with international operations including investments routed through TCL Global BV and TCL Specialties LLC in the United States, reflecting a strategy of global expansion in value-added chemical products.

Average Trading Volume: 31,501

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: 25.75B INR

Learn more about TIRUMALCHM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

The latest update is out from Globe Civil Projects Ltd. ( (IN:GLOBECIVIL) ).

Globe Civil Projects Ltd. has approved its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended 31 March 2026, with auditors issuing an unmodified opinion, underscoring the company’s adherence to regulatory and reporting standards. The board also confirmed the re-appointment of its cost and internal auditors for FY 2026-27, signaling continuity in its internal control, cost management, and compliance framework, which may reassure investors and regulators about the robustness of its governance systems.

On the recommendation of the audit committee, the company re-appointed M/s Jain Sharma & Associates as cost auditor and M/s Rajnish & Associates as internal auditor for the upcoming financial year. These moves align Globe Civil Projects’ governance with SEBI’s listing obligations and emphasize the company’s commitment to maintaining transparent, well-documented financial and operational oversight across its civil projects portfolio.

More about Globe Civil Projects Ltd.

Globe Civil Projects Ltd. operates in the civil infrastructure and construction sector, providing project execution and related engineering services. The company is listed on Indian stock exchanges and is subject to SEBI’s listing and disclosure regulations, indicating a focus on regulated capital markets and compliance-driven governance practices.

data.title: Aspen Group Reports No New Developments in Glove Unit Wind-Up, Sets Final Meetings for Kanada-Ya Liquidations
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

An announcement from Aspen (Group) Holdings Ltd. ( (SG:1F3) ) is now available.

Aspen (Group) Holdings Ltd. reported that there has been no material development since April regarding the winding up of its glove manufacturing subsidiary, Aspen Glove Sdn. Bhd., which remains in liquidation. This indicates the group’s exit from that business segment is progressing without new complications, maintaining the status quo for creditors and investors tied to that unit.

The company also announced that final shareholders’ and creditors’ meetings for its wholly owned subsidiary Kanada-Ya Singapore SG Pte. Ltd. and its restaurant unit Kanada-Ya Restaurants Pte. Ltd., both in liquidation, are scheduled for June 23, 2026. These meetings mark a key step toward concluding the liquidation of Aspen’s Kanada-Ya restaurant operations in Singapore, providing a clearer pathway for resolving outstanding stakeholder claims and potentially reshaping the group’s future focus.

More about Aspen (Group) Holdings Ltd.

Aspen (Group) Holdings Ltd., incorporated in Singapore, operates as an investment holding company with interests in various subsidiaries, including those involved in manufacturing and food and beverage operations. The group’s portfolio includes Aspen Glove Sdn. Bhd. and the Kanada-Ya-branded restaurant businesses in Singapore, reflecting a diversified sector exposure.

data.title: Havila Shipping Wins Appeal as Court Denies Banks’ Asset Attachment Bid
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

Havila Shipping ASA ( (DE:H4S) ) has shared an announcement.

Havila Shipping ASA has announced that the Borgarting Court of Appeal has denied a request from DNB Bank, Swedbank and Danske Bank to secure attachment of assets within the group. The ruling removes an immediate legal and financial uncertainty over the company’s vessel assets, offering short-term relief for its balance sheet and potentially strengthening its negotiating position with key lenders and other stakeholders.

The decision marks a setback for the creditor banks, which had sought additional security over Havila Shipping’s assets amid earlier disputes, and may influence future restructuring talks. While the broader implications for the company’s long-term financing arrangements remain to be seen, the outcome reduces near-term enforcement risk and supports operational continuity in its offshore shipping activities.

More about Havila Shipping ASA

Havila Shipping ASA operates in the maritime services industry, focusing on offshore supply and support vessels that serve the oil and gas sector and related offshore activities. The company’s fleet and operations are closely tied to financing arrangements with major Nordic banks, reflecting its capital-intensive, asset-based business model.

Average Trading Volume: 712,736

Current Market Cap: NOK317.8M

data.title: OVS Approves €0.14 Dividend and Publishes Updated Corporate Bylaws
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

OVS S.p.A. ( (IT:OVS) ) has issued an announcement.

OVS S.p.A. shareholders approved the distribution of an ordinary dividend of €0.14 per share, to be paid on 24 June 2026 to investors of record on 23 June, with coupon detachment scheduled for 22 June. Treasury shares held by the company on the record date are excluded from the payout, underscoring a disciplined approach to capital returns and clarifying the effective yield for public shareholders.

The company also announced that the minutes of the 29 May 2026 shareholders’ meeting and the updated Articles of Association will be made publicly available at its registered office, on its corporate website and via the authorised storage system 1Info. This move enhances governance transparency and provides investors and other stakeholders with formal documentation of the meeting’s resolutions and the new corporate bylaw framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:OVS) stock is a Buy with a EUR5.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on OVS S.p.A. stock, see the IT:OVS Stock Forecast page.

More about OVS S.p.A.

OVS S.p.A. is an Italian company headquartered in Venice-Mestre and operates in the retail sector, focusing on fashion and apparel under its own brands. The group targets a broad consumer base through its nationwide store network and online channels, positioning itself as a leading player in Italy’s affordable clothing market.

Average Trading Volume: 461,380

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €1.42B
